tools.name: history.deleteHistoryItemsV1HistoryDeletePost
tools.description: Delete a number of history items by their IDs.

tools.name: history.deleteHistoryItemV1HistoryHistoryItemIdDelete
tools.description: Delete a history item by its ID

tools.name: history.downloadHistoryItemsV1HistoryDownloadPost
tools.description: Download one or more history items. If one history item ID is provided, we will return a single audio file. If more than one history item IDs are provided, we will provide the history items packed into a .zip file.

tools.name: history.getAudioFromHistoryItemV1HistoryHistoryItemIdAudioGet
tools.description: Returns the audio of an history item.

tools.name: history.getGeneratedItemsV1HistoryGet
tools.description: Returns metadata about all your generated audio.

tools.name: samples.deleteSampleV1VoicesVoiceIdSamplesSampleIdDelete
tools.description: Removes a sample by its ID.

tools.name: samples.getAudioFromSampleV1VoicesVoiceIdSamplesSampleIdAudioGet
tools.description: Returns the audio corresponding to a sample attached to a voice.

tools.name: textToSpeech.textToSpeechV1TextToSpeechVoiceIdPost
tools.description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns audio.

tools.name: textToSpeech.textToSpeechV1TextToSpeechVoiceIdStreamPost
tools.description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns audio as an audio stream.

tools.name: user.getUserInfoV1UserGet
tools.description: Gets information about the user

tools.name: user.getUserSubscriptionInfoV1UserSubscriptionGet
tools.description: Gets extended information about the users subscription

tools.name: voices.addVoiceV1VoicesAddPost
tools.description: Add a new voice to your collection of voices in VoiceLab.

tools.name: voices.deleteVoiceV1VoicesVoiceIdDelete
tools.description: Deletes a voice by its ID.

tools.name: voices.editVoiceSettingsV1VoicesVoiceIdSettingsEditPost
tools.description: Edit your settings for a specific voice. "similarity_boost" corresponds to"Clarity + Similarity Enhancement" in the web app and "stability" corresponds to "Stability" slider in the web app.

tools.name: voices.editVoiceV1VoicesVoiceIdEditPost
tools.description: Edit a voice created by you.

tools.name: voices.getDefaultVoiceSettingsV1VoicesSettingsDefaultGet
tools.description: Gets the default settings for voices. "similarity_boost" corresponds to"Clarity + Similarity Enhancement" in the web app and "stability" corresponds to "Stability" slider in the web app.

tools.name: voices.getVoiceSettingsV1VoicesVoiceIdSettingsGet
tools.description: Returns the settings for a specific voice. "similarity_boost" corresponds to"Clarity + Similarity Enhancement" in the web app and "stability" corresponds to "Stability" slider in the web app.

tools.name: voices.getVoicesV1VoicesGet
tools.description: Gets a list of all available voices for a user.

tools.name: voices.getVoiceV1VoicesVoiceIdGet
tools.description: Returns metadata about a specific voice.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
